resend.scope: Resend testing sender to account-owner recipient
notes: A previous successful Resend smoke returned message ID 808d95ee-bf2e-4a40-a389-3ef912f9422a.
Sending to arbitrary recipients returned Resend's testing-mode restriction.
Domain verification is still required for production recipient coverage.
Live Mailchimp Transactional delivery was skipped because the provider is paid or account-gated.
The current adapter requires both LOOPS_API_KEY and LOOPS_TRANSACTIONAL_ID.
